cells.value: Refer to IAS-5100 Removal and Installation 2
cells.text: Refer to IAS-5100 Removal and Installation 2

cells.value: Disconnect the 2 cables on the lamp board, remove the 4 fixing screws, and replace with a new light source board.
cells.text: Disconnect the 2 cables on the lamp board, remove the 4 fixing screws, and replace with a new light source board.

cells.value: Follow the reverse sequence of the above steps for reassembly.
cells.text: Follow the reverse sequence of the above steps for reassembly.
